/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt CMakeFiles/rtspIPCamera.dir/src/appSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspIPCamera.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspIPCamera.dir/src/camera/mipi_camera.c.o CMakeFiles/rtspIPCamera.dir/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/common/system_opt/system_opt.cpp.o -o rtspIPCamera   -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/media/gst_opt  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/media/gst_opt -lrga -lpthread -lstdc++ -lgst_opt -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0
